parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT f.id, f.tenant_id, f.client_id, f.date, f.montant_ht, f.montant_tva, f.montant_ttc, f.taux_tva, c.siret, c.tva_number, c.pays FROM factures f LEFT JOIN clients c ON f.client_id = c.id WHERE f.tenant_id = '" + $json.tenantId + "' AND f.date >= '" + $json.periodeDebut + "' AND f.date <= '" + $json.periodeFin + "' AND ((('" + $json.type + "' = 'B2C' AND (c.siret IS NULL OR c.tva_number IS NULL)) OR ('" + $json.type + "' = 'INTERNATIONAL' AND c.pays != 'FR')))" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO e_reportings (id, tenant_id, type, periode_debut, periode_fin, nombre_transactions, montant_total_ht, montant_total_tva, montant_total_ttc, donnees, statut, date_generation) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), '" + $json.tenantId + "', '" + $json.type + "', '" + $json.periodeDebut + "', '" + $json.periodeFin + "', '" + $json.count + "', '" + $json.totalHT + "', '" + $json.totalTVA + "', '" + $json.totalTTC + "', '" + $json.json) + "', 'en_attente', NOW()) RETURNING *" }}

parameters.text:
🇫🇷 E-Reporting
Obligation de transmission des données
de transactions B2C et internationales
à l'administration fiscale.
Article 290 du CGI
Concerne: ventes aux particuliers et export
